evaluator: fresh independent Level 2 evaluator (Copilot CLI Chief)
summary: Full-epic F003 Level 2 close-out over merged main (config PR #9, domain model/migration PR #10, Z0 engine PR #11). All four acceptance steps independently and adversarially verified against a live PostgreSQL stack; regression suite and 12/12 stack smoke green. F003 flipped to passes:true.

acceptance_steps.name: validate_good_and_bad_yaml_actionable_errors
acceptance_steps.acceptance_step: Validate good and bad YAML with actionable errors.
evidence: python -m app.config.cli validate over all four config/examples files returned exit 0 with 'All 4 configuration file(s) valid.' (application/schedules/llm-providers/provider families each detected and model-validated).

Independent adversarial bad-YAML probes each returned exit 1 with an actionable, file-scoped message: syntax error ('YAML syntax error at line 2 column 1: expected "," or "]"...'); unknown family ('could not determine configuration family from top-level keys ...'); inline secret ('sources[0].api_key: inline secret key ... reference an environment variable via api_key_env instead'); schema violation ('schedules: Input should be a valid dictionary or instance of ScheduleSet'); empty file ('file is empty').
Mixed good+bad batch reported OK for the valid file and FAIL for the secret file and exited 1, proving per-file diagnostics.
The loader never emits secret values; the inline-secret guard blocks credentials by key name and points at the *_env indirection.
tests/unit/test_config_system.py passes inside the offline suite (147 passed, 10 skipped).

acceptance_steps.name: apply_rollback_reapply_migrations
acceptance_steps.acceptance_step: Apply, rollback, and reapply database migrations.
evidence: Against live PostgreSQL, an independent Alembic probe ran command.upgrade(head) -> command.downgrade('0002_worker_queue') -> command.upgrade(head): PASS apply_head_creates_offer_version/evidence; PASS rollback_removes_offer_version/evidence; PASS rollback_keeps_infra_job_queue (0001/0002 infra tables untouched); PASS reapply_head_recreates_offer_version/evidence.

tests/integration/test_domain_migration.py::test_migration_round_trip PASSED (downgrade to 0002 removes all 13 domain tables, upgrade to head recreates them, zero model/migration drift via compare_metadata).
test_all_domain_tables_created and test_no_model_migration_drift PASSED, confirming the merged migration matches the ORM metadata.

acceptance_steps.name: immutable_offer_versions_and_evidence_provenance
acceptance_steps.acceptance_step: Verify immutable offer versions and evidence provenance.
evidence: Independent direct-SQL adversarial probe against live PostgreSQL: PASS offer_version_update_rejected (UPDATE of an existing offer_version raised restrict_violation via trg_offer_version_immutable); PASS offer_version_delete_rejected (DELETE rejected); PASS offer_version_append_allowed (a new version_number INSERT succeeded, confirming append-only, not a frozen table).

Evidence provenance cannot be rewritten: PASS evidence_source_delete_restricted and PASS evidence_snapshot_delete_restricted (deleting a Source/Snapshot referenced by Evidence is blocked by ondelete=RESTRICT); PASS evidence_dangling_fk_rejected (Evidence with non-existent source/offer_version/snapshot FKs is rejected).

tests/integration/test_domain_migration.py::test_immutability_trigger_installed, test_offer_version_is_append_only, test_evidence_requires_valid_provenance_fks, and test_representative_provenance_query all PASSED against live PostgreSQL.

Migration 0003 installs offer_version_immutable() plpgsql function + BEFORE UPDATE OR DELETE trigger (ERRCODE restrict_violation), matching docs/DATA_MODEL.md; Evidence links source/offer_version/snapshot via NOT NULL FKs.
stack-smoke check 'Domain migration applied (0003 tables + immutability trigger)' PASSED on the running stack.

acceptance_steps.name: z0_truth_table_unknown_and_contradictory
acceptance_steps.acceptance_step: Run the Z0 truth table including unknown and contradictory conditions.
evidence: Independent adversarial probe over the full gate matrix PASSED all cases: canonical Z0/Z1/Z2/Z3 gates; UNKNOWN for unknown card, unknown paid-deps, no quota data, 'unknown' exhaustion, and unrecognised exhaustion; contradiction handling (card/auto-billing dominate trial and unknowns -> Z1; unknown dominates trial -> UNKNOWN; mixed safe+unknown exhaustion -> UNKNOWN); expired/bounded availability windows -> Z2; determinism (identical inputs => identical frozen ClassificationResult); explainability (every result carries ordered reasons; every non-Z0 result names >=1 blocking condition; Z0 has empty blocking_conditions).

Exhaustive invariant grid over 558 combinations (offer_type x card/paid tri-state x every exhaustion behaviour, plus the empty-quota grid) reported invariant_grid_no_unknown_z0 = 0 violations: NO unknown or contradictory material condition ever yields Z0, and no temporary offer type yields Z0.
classify() is pure/offline (no I/O, network, or LLM); classify_offer() ORM adapter reads Offer + latest OfferVersion quotas with no writes.

rubric_criteria.name: functional_correctness
rubric_criteria.evidence: All four acceptance steps verified end-to-end against a live stack.

rubric_criteria.name: data_and_evidence_integrity
rubric_criteria.evidence: offer_version append-only trigger + evidence RESTRICT/NOT NULL FKs enforce immutable, traceable provenance; verified adversarially.

rubric_criteria.name: zero_cost_safety
rubric_criteria.evidence: 558-combination invariant grid confirms no Z1/Z2/Z3/unknown/contradictory condition is mislabeled Z0; engine defaults to UNKNOWN.

rubric_criteria.name: security_privacy
rubric_criteria.evidence: Config loader forbids inline secrets and never emits values; detect-secrets green; engine has no I/O or credentials.

rubric_criteria.name: portability
rubric_criteria.evidence: No new runtime dependency (dependency manifest diff vs origin/main empty); engine is pure standard-library Python.

rubric_criteria.name: product_truth_no_unsupported_claims
rubric_criteria.evidence: Engine classifies supplied facts only and defaults to UNKNOWN; no real-service free/Z0 claim introduced.

rubric_criteria.name: regression_safety
rubric_criteria.evidence: scripts/test.ps1, scripts/check.ps1 -NodeAudit, and stack-up/stack-smoke(12/12)/stack-down all green; F001/F002 baselines unaffected.

command_results.scripts_stack_cycle: exit 0; stack-up healthy (postgres/api/worker/scheduler/web); stack-smoke 12/12 PASS incl. domain migration + immutability trigger; stack-down clean, no running services.

known_issues_or_risks: The Z0 engine is pure and fully tested but is not yet wired into runtime ingestion/API/persistence; that is deliberately deferred to F004+ and does not affect F003 acceptance.
Zero-cost class labels are local engine constants guarded against app.models.vocab.ZERO_COST_CLASSES drift by a unit test; offer types and exhaustion behaviours are imported from vocab at runtime.
recommendation: Accept F003 as passing at commit e23212997763bf4e3a2bd9f72e53d475dfc2ec36. All four acceptance steps are independently and adversarially verified with a required Level 2 evaluation; F003.passes set to true. Next priority feature: F004 (source-ingestion).
